gt_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM votes AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.UserId = 24
pred_sql: SELECT CAST((SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = 24) AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Id) FROM votes WHERE UserId = 24) AS "CAST(COUNT(T2.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id)";
question: For the user No.24, how many times is the number of his/her posts compared to his/her votes?
